description: SQLite Persistent Storage: Create persistence package with SQLite implementations of MemoryStore, ConceptRegistry, TheoryRegistry, IdentityStore, and Checkpoint. Uses only stdlib sqlite3 with JSON columns. Same interfaces as in-memory stores. Document thefts 5.69-5.72 from Mem0, MemGPT, LangGraph, SQLite WAL.
steps: Create virtual_genesis/persistence/migrations.py with schema creation (memories, concepts, theories, identity, checkpoints tables) and version management. Use WAL mode and JSON1 extension.

Create virtual_genesis/persistence/sqlite_store.py with SQLiteMemoryStore class implementing same interface as InMemoryMemoryStore (store_memory, get, all, apply_decay, archive_memory, deprecate_memory, delete_memory, get_active_memories, record_access). Store MemoryUnit fields in columns + content as JSON. Use sqlite3.Row for reads.

Create virtual_genesis/persistence/sqlite_concept_registry.py with SQLiteConceptRegistry implementing same interface as InMemoryConceptRegistry (add_candidate, get_candidate, add_concept, list_candidates, list_concepts). Schema: id, name, definition/data as JSON, confidence, predictive_value, created_at.

Create virtual_genesis/persistence/sqlite_theory_registry.py with SQLiteTheoryRegistry implementing same interface as InMemoryTheoryRegistry (add_theory, list_theories). Schema: id, name/family, claims_json, predictive_value, explanatory_power, prediction_count, created_at.

Create virtual_genesis/persistence/sqlite_identity_store.py with SQLiteIdentityStore for persisting AgentIdentityObject. Schema: id, commitments_json, self_model_json, lineage_json, drift_score, accountability_log_json, updated_at.
Create virtual_genesis/persistence/checkpoint.py with save_checkpoint(session_id, state_dict, db_path) and load_checkpoint(session_id, db_path) functions for full state save/restore.
Update virtual_genesis/api/config.py to add use_persistence: bool = False and db_path: str = './sia_data.db' fields to APIConfig.
Update virtual_genesis/api/session.py to use SQLite stores when APIConfig.use_persistence is True (import SQLite stores, conditionally create them in Session.__init__).

Create tests/test_persistence.py with 20+ tests: test migrations create tables, test SQLiteMemoryStore CRUD operations (store, get, all, decay, archive, delete, get_active), test SQLiteConceptRegistry add/list candidates and concepts, test SQLiteTheoryRegistry add/list theories, test SQLiteIdentityStore save/load, test checkpoint save/restore, test WAL mode enabled, test concurrent access safety, test session with persistence enabled.
Add thefts 5.69-5.72 to Virtual_SIA_Legitimate_Thefts_RealWorld_AR.md (Mem0, MemGPT/Letta, LangGraph Persistence, SQLite WAL).
Create Virtual_SIA_Persistence_Implementation_Memo_AR.md in Arabic explaining design decisions.
acceptance_criteria: virtual_genesis/persistence/ package exists with all 6 modules
SQLiteMemoryStore has same interface as InMemoryMemoryStore
SQLiteConceptRegistry has same interface as InMemoryConceptRegistry
SQLiteTheoryRegistry has same interface as InMemoryTheoryRegistry
APIConfig has use_persistence and db_path fields
Session uses SQLite stores when use_persistence=True
findings: All 381 tests pass (344 original + 37 new). Fixed load_latest ordering issue by adding rowid DESC tiebreaker (datetime resolution is seconds so same-second inserts need rowid for deterministic ordering). Session constructor now accepts optional config parameter - backward compatible with no args.
